title: Freddy Plushie
description: A texture pack changes the look of the Totem of undying to a Freddy plushie
body: ![Project banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9b59495f1194cad99f7b6a429519bccc85f6d46_0.webp) # NEW ADDITION - If you ever feel scared at night and need someone to make you feel safe, just give this little one a hug and you are guaranteed to feel safer. - The star of the show, Freddy, joins your world in shape of a little plushie. # FEATURES - Replaces the totem of undying with a Freddy plushie ![DFP License](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a152de28ddc0817bbebfbb2e2115a60df840b42d.png) # SUPPORTED VERSIONS - 1.19 - 1.19.2 - 1.19.3 - 1.19.4 - 1.20 - 1.20.1 - 1.20.2 - 1.20.3 - 1.20.4 - 1.20.5 - 1.20.6 - 1.21 - 1.21.3 - 1.21.4 - 1.21.5 # LINKS ![Website button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d733ec80f664d05d32e895120b27255af2c43f4.png) ![Updates button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d60f52b867a52a022b51e68dbba88e87fc4c5cdf.png) ![Discord button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3ba5b8444bad6549509287c8ccd717887151e0b.png)
